title: Accessible Listbox

statement.markdown:
## Accessible Listbox

### Listbox Structure
- The listbox should have a clear and consistent structure.
- The listbox should have a title that describes its purpose.
- The listbox should have a clear way to navigate the list.
- The listbox should have a clear indication of the currently selected item.
- The listbox should be fully functional with keyboard navigation.

constraints: Use Tailwind CSS classes for styling.
Implement a solution that can be easily expanded or modified.
Use JavaScript to handle keyboard navigation and event handling.
Make sure that the listbox is accessible on a wide range of devices and browsers.
